message:
feat(fp-frame): add DataFrame.std_agg_ddof and var_agg_ddof

Per-column standard deviation and variance with configurable degrees of
freedom (ddof) for DataFrame, mirroring the Series.std_ddof/var_ddof
methods. ddof=0 for population, ddof=1 for sample statistics.

2 new tests, 848 total.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
